topics.title: XM Satellite Radio Financial Struggles
topics.summary: The show reports on XM Satellite's declining market share and financial losses as it struggles to compete with smaller rivals.

topics.title: Comedy Career Milestones and Upcoming Performances
topics.summary: The studio discusses the challenges of stand-up comedy, critiques specific jokes about Sal, and celebrates a headlining gig at Carnegie Hall.

topics.title: Riley Martin Contract Negotiations and Mel Gibson Arrest
topics.summary: The studio discusses the failed negotiations with Riley Martin over unpaid invoices and his aggressive behavior before transitioning to a report on actor Mel Gibson's arrest for driving under the influence.

topics.title: Mel Gibson Arrest and Controversy
topics.summary: The show discusses the details of Mel Gibson's arrest for a DUI, his reported anti-Semitic remarks during the incident, and the subsequent media backlash.

topics.title: Artie Lange Acting Roles
topics.summary: The studio features Artie Lange discussing his upcoming guest role as a sarcastic tour guide on the television show Rescue Me.

topics.title: Robin's Interest in Racing Schools
topics.summary: The studio discusses Robin's interest in attending a racing school to learn how to drive her Corvette on a track.

topics.title: High-Performance Driving and Guest Appearances
topics.summary: The studio discusses the technical aspects of high-performance driving, a potential race between guests, and upcoming appearances by Gene Simmons.

topics.title: Celebrity Name Guessing Game
topics.summary: The studio hosts a game where callers attempt to identify celebrity names spoken with heavy accents to win cash from a movie promotion.

topics.title: Gene Simmons and Shannon Tweed Interview
topics.summary: The studio features a candid conversation between Gene Simmons and Shannon Tweed regarding their personal lives, past relationships with celebrities like Cher and Diana Ross, and the inner workings of the band KISS.

topics.title: Gene Simmons and Relationship Dynamics
topics.summary: The show features Gene Simmons discussing his long-term relationship with Shannon, the importance of cohabitation agreements for high-profile figures, and various anecdotes regarding KISS performances and band members.

topics.title: Gene Simmons and Shannon Tweed Interview
topics.summary: The studio features an interview with Gene Simmons and Shannon Tweed regarding their new television show, their personal lives, and various anecdotes involving the band Kiss.

topics.title: Mel Gibson and Holocaust Conspiracy Theories
topics.summary: The studio discusses Mel Gibson’s family history, conspiracy theories regarding the Holocaust, and local news updates including a potential power outage in New York City.

topics.title: Mel Gibson and Tommy Morrison News
topics.summary: The studio discusses Mel Gibson's controversial public remarks regarding his faith and the media coverage of his anti-Semitic comments, followed by a segment on boxer Tommy Morrison's claims that his 1996 HIV diagnosis was a false positive.

topics.title: Chris Kattan and FHM Contest
topics.summary: The studio features Chris Kattan discussing his girlfriend's entry into a modeling contest, the career of Mel Gibson, and an interaction regarding Smokey Robinson.

topics.title: Smokey Robinson Interview
topics.summary: The studio hosts a conversation with Smokey Robinson regarding his personal life, songwriting career at Motown, and the financial success of hits like "My Girl."

topics.title: Middle East Conflict and Global News
topics.summary: The show covers reports of bombings in Iraq, the ongoing conflict in Lebanon involving Hezbollah and Israel, updates on Fidel Castro's health, extreme heat across the United States, Arnold Schwarzenegger's climate initiatives, and news regarding Tommy Morrison and the Tour de France.
